title: isolepis squarrosa
intro: Isolepis squarrosa, also known as the rough club-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isolepis squarrosa include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
